metadata.name: Reconcile AR Sub-Ledger to General Ledger

description: As part of the month-end close, an accountant must verify that the AR aging report total matches the AR account in the general ledger.

nodes.task_description: Run the Accounts Receivable aging report as of the last day of the month.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates the report showing a total AR balance of $1,250,500.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the month-end balance for the Accounts Receivable account from the general ledger.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the GL balance is $1,250,500.

nodes.task_description: Compare the two totals and confirm they reconcile.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the AR sub-ledger is in balance with the GL.
